snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3118: Will Jetha's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Missamma || Episode - 4 || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Arjun Kalyan || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
From the creators of #softwaredevloveper comes a story of innocence, gumption and redemption. Follow and enjoy the journey of "Mahalakshmi" as she traverses through life's emotions with grit and panache. 

"Missamma" is a Telugu  Web Series Featuring Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan & Avinash Reddy Anam

Cast:- Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan, Avinash Reddy Anam, Ashwini, Mounica, Satish, Sathwik G Roy, 

Directed by Venkat Rdy ( Naani )

Written - Prashanth Babu Ragathi

Editing :- Shiva Pavan

DI :- Raj Krish

Cinematography  - Bhanu Prakash Musmuri

Sound engineer - Vamshi Vinod Nalli ( Nani )

Title and Poster designer - Nikhil Concepts

Title Animation :- Konte Pavan kumar   

Executive Producer - Sri Vidya P 

Line Producer - Rishi Reddy

Music - Srujan Shashanka

Gimbal Operator - Prashanth Narala

Producer : Infinitum Media

#VaishnaviChaitanya is known for her music videos and cover songs and for acting in the Blockbuster Movie "Ala Vaikunta Puram Lo"

" Vaishnavi Chaitanya is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator &  Actor at Telugu Film Industry

This is produced by Infinitum media.

#Missamma

snippet.title: CID MOOSA | PRAGATHI
snippet.description:
'CID MOOSA' An evergreen comical box office hit in Malayalam film industry. The whole plot took us for a roller coaster of fun and laughter. Cinemas were filled with roaring laughs watching the Hollywood flicks of super characters , funky cars and wits of MOOSA . The surprising musical arrangements of the film have amused all of us and are still in our playlist . Here PRAGATHI comes up with a reprise of the epic song KAADIRANGI . Go watch ,enjoy and repeat рҹ”Ғ 

Pragathi

KS Harisankar ( Vocals)
Precious Peter (Keys)
Abin Sagar (Guitars)
Abhijith Sudhi (Bass)
Abishek Amanath (Drums)

Original Song Credits

Lyrics - Gireesh Puthancheri
Music - Vidyasagar
Singer- V Devanand, Prathap, Timmi & Tippu
Movie - CID Moosa

Recorded & Mixed By Sai Prakash @My Studio, Kochi
Mastered By Balu Thankachan @20db Sound Studios, Chennai

Produced By BOLDOVA PRODUCTIONS

snippet.title: Dhee ft. Arivu - Enjoy Enjaami (Prod. Santhosh Narayanan)
snippet.description:
Enjoy Enjaami  - Available now https://music.maajja.com/enjoyenjaami

Artist: Dhee ft. Arivu
Producer: Santhosh Narayanan
Director: Amith Krishnan (Studio MOCA)
Produced by: maajja 

Music video by Dhee and Arivu performing Enjoy Enjaami. (C) 2021 maajja inc.

Follow Dhee: https://www.instagram.com/dhee___
Follow Arivu: https://www.instagram.com/therukural
Follow Santhosh Narayanan: https://www.instagram.com/musicsanthosh
Follow maajja: https://www.instagram.com/joinmaajja
Follow Studio MOCA: https://www.instagram.com/moca.studio

Lyrics:
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thaatha thaatha kala vetti
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Pondhula yaaru meen koththi
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thanniyil odum thavalaikki
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Kambali poochi thangachi 

Allimalar kodi angadhame
Ottara ottara sandhaname
Mullai malar kodi muththaarame
Engooru engooru kuththaalame

Surukku paiyamma
Veththala mattaiyamma
Somandha kaiyamma
Maththalam kottuyamma
Thaaiyamma thaaiyamma
Enna panna maayamma 
Valliamma peraandi
Sangadhiya kellendi
Kannaadiya kaanaamdi 
Indhaarraa peraandi

Annakkili annakkili 
Adi aalamarakkela vannakkili
Nallapadi vaazhacholli 
Indha manna koduthaane
Poorvakudi
Kammaankara kaaniyellaam
Paadith thirinjaane
Aadhikkudi
Naayi nari 
Poonaikundhan
Indha erikkolam kooda sondhammadi 

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Cuckoo cuckoo...
Muttaiya podum kozhikku 
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Oppanai yaaru maiyilukku 
Cuckoo cuckoo
Pachchaiya poosum paasikku
Cuckoo cuckoo
Kuchchiya adukkuna kootukku 

Paadu patta makka 
Varappu mettukkaara
Vervathanni sokkaa 
Minukkum naattukkaara
Aakaatti karuppatti
Oodhaangolu mannuchatti
Aathoram koodukatti
Arambichcha naagareegam
Jhan jhana jhanakku jhana makkale
Uppuku chappu kottu
Muttaikulla saththukottu
Attaikku raththangkottu
Kittipullu vettu vettu

Naan anju maram valarthen...
Azhagana thottam vachchen...
Thottam sezhithaalum en thonda 
nanaiyalaye

En kadale karaye...
Vaname saname...
Nelame kolame...
Edame thadame...

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Paattan poottan kaaththa boomi
aatam pottu kaattum saami 
Raatinandha suththi vandha
Seva koovuchu
Adhu pottu vachcha echamdhaane
Kaada maarichu
Namma naada maarichu 
Indha veeda maarichu

Enna kora enna kora
En seeni karumbukku enna kora 
Enna kora enna kora
En chella peraandikku enna kora

Pandhalulla paavarka...
Pandhalulla paavarka
Vedhakallu vitturukku...
Vedhakallu vitturukku
Appan aathaa vittadhungo
Appan aathaa vittandhungo

Ah.....

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

#Dhee | #Arivu | #EnjoyEnjaami

snippet.title: Bholenath Ki Shadi (Official Video) Hansraj Raghuwanshi || Shivratri Special 2021 | Jamie |RaviRaj||
snippet.description:
Bholenath Ki Shadi (Official Video) Hansraj Raghuwanshi || Maha Shivratri Special 2021 || Jamie || Ravi Raj ||
аӨ№аӨӮаӨёаӨ°аӨҫаӨң аӨ°аӨҳаҘҒаӨөаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨЁаӨҸ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨң аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨёаӨ¬аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаҘӢаӨІаҘҮаӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҶаӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ | аӨҶаӨӘ аӨёаӨ¬аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ Teaser аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ |аӨ№аӨӮаӨёаӨ°аӨҫаӨң аӨ°аӨҳаҘҒаӨөаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӯаҘӢаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӯаӨҫаӨө аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аӨёаҘҚаӨӨ аӨЎаӨҫаӨӮаӨё аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ |  

аӨҶаӨӘ аӨёаӨ¬аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝ 2021 аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨ¬аӨ§аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аҘӢ |

#Ilzaam #AmitSainiRohtakiya #PRaGati #SonotekMusic #AnilAggarwal #SoyabKhan #LatestHaryanviSongs2021 #NewHaryaviSongsHaryanavi2021 #LatestHaryanviSong2021 #NewHaryanviSongs2021#haryanviSongs2021


Rae tanae dhokhe aali foonk tae bujayi baati rae
baat kari ghani tanae taati taati rae
maada tame dekh kae nae kalaa chhod diya
reha koni yaar ka aaj koye sathi rae
rae kuchh reha bhi ni baaki ghani khelgi chalaaki
ib kis nae bta de badnaam kah du mae

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae tanae dhokhe aala teer sidha maarya chhati main
rae nash nash main terae dhokha bharya
jhoothi saachi baat manae maani saari saachi rae
tere chakkar main aake manae kaand tha karya
teri baat saari jaali teri baat thi rae jaali
kisne bta de tera naam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae maade aala krishan bhukha pyar ka tha
bas dhokha bharya teri neet main
tanae pyar aali baaji khwli dhokae tai
usne samajh baithi jeet rae
anil agarwal kare pyar aaj bhi
rae roj tere naam ka ek jaam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

snippet.title: аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨҰаӨ°аӨІаҘҲаӨӮаӨЎаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҝаӨӨ | 2011 аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨө аӨ•аӨӘ
snippet.description:
аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨ аӨЁаҘҮ 2011 аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨө аӨ•аӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҒаӨӘ аӨ—аҘҮаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЁаҘҲаӨҰаӨ°аӨІаҘҲаӨӮаӨЎаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҒаӨҡ аӨөаӨҝаӨ•аҘҮаӨҹ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨҹаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаӨҫаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨңаӨ¬аҘӮаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘӨ

аӨ”аӨ° аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ®аӨҝаӨІ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ«аҘҮаӨёаӨ¬аҘҒаӨ• аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҒаӨӘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ рҹ‘ү https://bit.ly/YTFBHindi

snippet.title: Teri Jagah Sharab Ne Le Li, Kita Tenu Pyar Si Naare (Full Song) Parry Sidhu | New Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
TU SHAYAR BANAAGI Lyrics by Parry Sidhu is the latest Punjabi song. MixSingh composed music, and the lyrics for Punjabi track вҖҳTU SHAYAR BANAAGIвҖҳ are written by Parry Sidhu.
TU SHAYAR BANAAGI PUNJABI SONG LYRICS вҖў PARRY SIDHU
Original Song Link - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z2AkDCrlm3E
Subscribe Mix Singh Channel - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z2AkDCrlm3E

Tu Shayar Banagi Aye,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,
Khede Kaami La Gayi Ae,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,

Ho Jaape Meri Zindagi Cho,
Jiven Sare Cha Muk Gaye,
Tainu Main Bhulava Ni,
Ohh Injh Lage Saah Ruk Gaye,
Ni Injh Lage Saah Ruk Gaye,
Diti Teri Gaani,
Pyar Nishani,
Hun Faah Lage Gal Nu,

Tu Shayar Banagi Aye,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,
Ni Kade Kaami Laa Gayi Ae,
Haaye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,

Kita Tainu Pyar Se Naare,
Hadha Bane Tod Ke Saare,
Tu Ta Chaleyae Dil Tod Gayi,
Mai Tere Lai Toda Taare,
Jakham Jo Deh Gayi Ae,
Cheti Oho Parne Nai,
Ni Jheda Dukh Main Jarda,
Hor Ne Jarne Ne,
Ni Buk Buk Rova Main,
Ekala Jido Hova Main,
Yaad Kar Har Gal Nu,


 
Tu Shayar Banagi Aye,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,
Ni Kade Kaami Laa Gayi Ae,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,

Teri Jagha Sharab Ne Lay Le,
Ditta Tere Gulab Ne Le Layi,
Main Ta Hun Dass Ki Jena Hai,
Mere Jind Tere Khwab Ne Le Layi,
Ni Parry Tera Geet Likhda,
Kalam Vi Rondi Ae,
Ni Jina Cher Mai Jagda,
Ae Vi Kithe Saundi Ae,

Ni Akh Teri Fadke Ge,
Tu Vi Mainu Tadfeh Ge,
Main Na Par Hona Kal Nu,

TU SHAYAR BANAAGI (Punjabi) Music Video
teri jagah sharab ne le li,new punjabi song,tu shayar banagi,Teri Jagah Sharab Ne Le Li,Kita Tenu Pyar Si Naare,parry sidhu,parry sidhu all songs,teri jagah sharab ne le li tu shayar banagi,teri jagah sharab ne le li full song,teri jagah sharab ne le li song
Let's watch the TU SHAYAR BANAAGIвҖҳs captivating music video directed by Garry Vilkhu.

TU SHAYAR BANAAGI is a brand-new Punjabi song by Parry Sidhu. MixSingh composed the music for TU SHAYAR BANAAGI. The lyricist Parry Sidhu penned-down the up-to-date lyrics of the Punjabi song. Garry Vilkhu directed the music video of вҖҳTU SHAYAR BANAAGIвҖҳ, released on February 3, 2021.

snippet.title: Hotstar Specials OK Computer | Trailer I Vijay Varma, Radhika Apte, Jackie Shroff, Anand Gandhi
snippet.description:
We have stone age emotions, industrial age institutions and space age technology - how are we going to reconcile our intentions with a future that arrives faster than we can imagine it? In the absence of legal or moral precedents for crimes committed by Artificial Intelligence, who does the justice system frame charges against? Errant technology or its human inventors?

 Hotstar Specials presents Ok Computer, all episodes streaming from Mar 26 

Created and Directed by: Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar
Produced by: Anand Gandhi, Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar

snippet.title: а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®°а®ҫа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°а®ҝ 4 а®•а®ҫа®І а®ӘаҜӮа®ңаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ & а®өа®ҝа®°а®Ө а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ| Sivarathiri | Maha Shivratri 2021 | Shivaratri vratham
snippet.description:
а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®ӘаҜҒа®°а®ҫа®Ја®®аҜҚ а®Өа®ҝа®©а®®аҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®•аҜҮа®ҹаҜҚа®Әа®Өа®ұаҜҚа®•а®ҫа®• а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚ & а®Ҷа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®ҝа®І а®өа®°а®ҝа®•а®іаҜҒа®ҹа®©аҜҚ | Sivapuranam in my voice with lyrics
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MiRay98qWCY

а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®°а®ҫа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°а®ҝ а®өа®ҝа®°а®Өа®®аҜҚ а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲ, а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®Ҝ а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ 4 а®•а®ҫа®І а®ӘаҜӮа®ңаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®…а®Әа®ҝа®·аҜҮа®•а®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®…а®°аҜҚа®ҡаҜҚа®ҡа®©аҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®ЁаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®өаҜҮа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ, а®Әа®ҹа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®•а®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®ӘаҜӮа®ңаҜҲ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®Ҝ а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ а®ЁаҜҮа®°а®®аҜҚ а®Һа®© а®…а®©аҜҲа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®Өа®•а®өа®ІаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҲа®ҜаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®®а®Өа®ҝ. а®ӨаҜҮа®ҡ а®®а®ҷаҜҚа®•аҜҲа®Ҝа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®°а®ҡа®ҝ а®…а®®аҜҚа®®а®ҫ а®…а®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢа®өа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®өа®ҝа®іа®•аҜҚа®•а®®а®ҫа®• а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®өа®ҝа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®іаҜҚа®іа®ҫа®°аҜҚ. 

а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®°а®ҫа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°а®ҝ а®өа®ҝа®°а®Өа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҮа®ұаҜҚа®•аҜҠа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®үа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®үа®ұа®өа®ҝа®©а®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒ а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢа®өаҜҲ а®·аҜҮа®°аҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®…а®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®…а®ұа®ҝа®ҜаҜҒа®®аҜҚа®Әа®ҹа®ҝ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ҜаҜҒа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ.  

- а®Ҷа®ӨаҜҚа®® а®һа®ҫа®© а®®аҜҲа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ

localized.title: а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®°а®ҫа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°а®ҝ 4 а®•а®ҫа®І а®ӘаҜӮа®ңаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ & а®өа®ҝа®°а®Ө а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ| Sivarathiri | Maha Shivratri 2021 | Shivaratri vratham

а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®°а®ҫа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°а®ҝ а®өа®ҝа®°а®Өа®®аҜҚ а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲ, а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®Ҝ а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ 4 а®•а®ҫа®І а®ӘаҜӮа®ңаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®…а®Әа®ҝа®·аҜҮа®•а®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®…а®°аҜҚа®ҡаҜҚа®ҡа®©аҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®ЁаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®өаҜҮа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ, а®Әа®ҹа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®•а®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ, а®ӘаҜӮа®ңаҜҲ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®Ҝ а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ а®ЁаҜҮа®°а®®аҜҚ а®Һа®© а®…а®©аҜҲа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®Өа®•а®өа®ІаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҲа®ҜаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®®а®Өа®ҝ. а®ӨаҜҮа®ҡ а®®а®ҷаҜҚа®•аҜҲа®Ҝа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®°а®ҡа®ҝ а®…а®®аҜҚа®®а®ҫ а®…а®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢа®өа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®өа®ҝа®іа®•аҜҚа®•а®®а®ҫа®• а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®өа®ҝа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®іаҜҚа®іа®ҫа®°аҜҚ. 

а®ҡа®ҝа®өа®°а®ҫа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°а®ҝ а®өа®ҝа®°а®Өа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҮа®ұаҜҚа®•аҜҠа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®үа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®үа®ұа®өа®ҝа®©а®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒ а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢа®өаҜҲ а®·аҜҮа®°аҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®…а®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®…а®ұа®ҝа®ҜаҜҒа®®аҜҚа®Әа®ҹа®ҝ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®ҜаҜҒа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ.

snippet.title: My first VLOG ENJOYED IN KASHMIR
snippet.description:
I had been longing to travel since a long time now, I recently had an opportunity to travel to one of the most beautiful places in our country for work, and I must say it was a wonderful experience, not just because of the place but also because of the people I had the chance to work with, souls as beautiful as the place.

Some of you had suggested me to make a vlog... so hereвҖҷs a little something that I have complied from my last trip to Kashmir. 
Please have a look and let me know if you like it. Your feedback means a lot вҷҘпёҸ

snippet.title: Majhi Baay Go | Nick Shinde | Shraddha Pawar |  Keval Walanj | Sonali Sonawane | Prashant Nakti
snippet.description:
рқ—Јрқ—ҝрқ—®рқҳҖрқ—өрқ—®рқ—»рқҳҒ рқ—Ўрқ—®рқ—ёрқҳҒрқ—¶ & рқ——рқ—ҝрқҳҶ рқ——рқ—®рқҳҶ рқ——рқ—¶рқ—ҙрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—®рқ—№ рқ—Јрқ—ҝрқ—ІрқҳҖрқ—Ірқ—»рқҳҒрқҳҖ..

аӨ—аӨҫаӨөаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ рқ‘ӯрқ’Ҷрқ’Ҷрқ’Қ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаӨҫ рқ‘әрқ’җрқ’Ҹрқ’Ҳ..Dont Miss The End

#MajhiBaayGo #NickShinde #ShraddhaPawar #PrashantNakti

рқҗҖ рқҗ’рқҗЁрқҗ§рқҗ  рқҗӣрқҗІ рқҗҸрқҗ«рқҗҡрқҗ¬рқҗЎрқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗӯ рқҗҚрқҗҡрқҗӨрқҗӯрқҗў

рқҗҸрқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗқрқҗ®рқҗңрқҗӯрқҗўрқҗЁрқҗ§ рқҗҮрқҗЁрқҗ®рқҗ¬рқҗһ: рқҗӮрқҗ’рқҗ„ рқҗ„рқҗ§рқҗӯрқҗһрқҗ«рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗҰрқҗһрқҗ§рқҗӯ рқҗҸрқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗқрқҗ®рқҗңрқҗӯрқҗўрқҗЁрқҗ§рқҗ¬

рқҗғрқҗўрқҗ«рқҗһрқҗңрқҗӯрқҗһрқҗқ рқҗӣрқҗІ рқҗ’рқҗ°рқҗҡрқҗ©рқҗ§рқҗўрқҗҘ рқҗҸрқҗҡрқҗӯрқҗўрқҗҘ

рқҗ’рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗ«riрқҗ§рқҗ  : рқҗҚрқҗўрқҗңрқҗӨ рқҗ’рқҗЎрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗқрқҗһ, рқҗ’рқҗЎрқҗ«рқҗҡрқҗқрқҗқрқҗЎрқҗҡ рқҗҸрқҗҡрқҗ°рқҗҡрқҗ«

рқҗҸрқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗЈрқҗһрқҗңрқҗӯ рқҗҮрқҗһрқҗҡрқҗқ : рқҗҸрқҗ«рқҗҡрқҗ¬рқҗЎрқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗӯ рқҗҚрқҗҡрқҗӨрқҗӯрқҗў, рқҗ‘рқҗЁрқҗЎрқҗўрқҗӯ рқҗүрқҗҡрқҗқрқҗЎрқҗҡрқҗҜ

рқҗӮрқҗ«рқҗһрқҗҡрқҗӯрқҗўрқҗҜрқҗһ рқҗҮрқҗһрқҗҡрқҗқ : рқҗҒрқҗЎрқҗ®рқҗ¬рқҗЎрқҗҡрқҗ§ рқҗүрқҗЁрқҗ¬рқҗЎрқҗў & Rishabh Sathe

рқҗҖрқҗ®рқҗқрқҗўрқҗЁ рқҗӮрқҗ«рқҗһрқҗқрқҗўрқҗӯрқҗ¬ :
Singers : Keval Walanj, Sonali Sonawane
Lyrics & Music Compostion :- Prashant Nakti

аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҶаӨІаҘӮ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨё аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨҰаӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҹаӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨё аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаӨҝаӨё аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨ«аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨё аӨҳаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨөаҘӢ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨҶаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ :)

snippet.title: Chanda Jhaanke - Official Video | Hansraj Raghuwanshi | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
'Chanda Jhaanke' is a devotional track but with a new-age sound crafted by Salim Sulaiman and has an infectious World music rhythm. 

The powerful vocals of Hansraj Raghuwanshi & Salim Merchant add a rich tint of folk with multiple Indian instruments enhancing the folk vibe of the song! Shradha Pandit has written the song in a poetic way that makes it more relatable to non-religious listeners as well. The ending of the song talks about different names for Lord Shiva.

рҹҺ§ Listen to & Download "Chanda Jhaanke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5X3oePi6rfWKfwwcAbjXQL?si=U3Weemg-Q_WckZkDjcsVag

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/chanda-jhaanke-single/1555674482

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/chanda-jhaanke

Episode 3117: Bhogilal Reaches Gokuldham
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal has finally arrived at Gokuldham with Jethalal's trap in place. Bhogilal is stalled by Taarak and Sunder at the doorstep of Jethalal's house. Over there, Taarak is introduced to Bhogilal as Champaklal's accountant. All of them make their way to the Gada household where the other society members are awaiting him. What will happen now? Will Jetha's plan move ahead smoothly? Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta

snippet.title: Shakti | аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ | Ep. 1190 | Virat Comes To Heer'S Rescue
snippet.description:
Angel leaves Harak Singh and the rest of his family helpless as she drags Heer out to take her along. However, the situation changes for Angel when she gets slapped by Virat as she comes out of the house. How will Angel retaliate to this insult?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26Kt-V0yTlZzY3RFB0Equyf1h

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: DIVINE - Satya | Prod. by Karan Kanchan | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/punyapaap

вҖңSatyaвҖқ is from DIVINEвҖҷs sophomore body of work, Punya Paap. Stirring up a 90вҖҷs-esque vibe, the track pays a thunderous ode to the city of Mumbai and the bygone era of Bollywood films. Sampling the classic track Goli Maar Bheje Mein from the Ram Gopal Varma directed film, the OG wrecking crew comprising of DIVINE and Karan Kanchan unite to wreak havoc. 

#DIVINE #PunyaPaap #Satya

Hit the LIKE button, share the video and do leave your comments below! AND subscribe to my channel right now!

Cheers!
